title: Ecbolium kuntzei
intro:
There is limited information available about Ecbolium kuntzei, and it may be considered an orphaned plant. However, based on the available information, Ecbolium kuntzei is a plant species within the family Acanthaceae. It has been reported to possess potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Ecbolium kuntzei may include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. 

Preparations made with this plant are not widely reported, however, it has been used in some traditional remedies.
